faq.title: Tattoo Studio Munich – your questions, our answers

locals.title: For locals:
locals.body: Our tattoo studio in Munich city center is easy to reach from all neighborhoods. Whether you're coming from Schwabing, Haidhausen, Neuhausen, or Sendling — public transit usually takes 20 minutes or less.

tourists.title: For tourists:
tourists.body: Located right by Marienplatz, we're a perfect stop for visitors to Munich. Combine your tattoo appointment with a stroll through Viktualienmarkt or a tour of the old town.

bottomBar.rights: Medusa Tattoo Munich. All rights reserved.
bottomBar.since: Since 1994 in the heart of Munich

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.subtitle: Answers about appointments, pricing, hygiene and aftercare.

howToBook.question: How do I book an appointment?
howToBook.answer: Use our online form or call us directly. We typically confirm requests within 24 hours.

reschedule.question: Can I reschedule my appointment?
reschedule.answer: Yes. Please let us know at least 48 hours in advance so we can arrange a new time.

deposit.question: Is a deposit required?
deposit.answer: For larger projects we may require a deposit. We will confirm the details during your consultation.

pricing.question: How are prices calculated?
pricing.answer: Pricing depends on size, placement, complexity and style. You will receive a clear estimate before booking.

paymentMethods.question: Which payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept cash, card payments and bank transfer.

hygiene.question: What hygiene standards do you follow?
hygiene.answer: We use sterile single-use materials, certified disinfection procedures and documented hygiene routines.

inkSafety.question: Are inks and materials safe?
inkSafety.answer: We use tested pigments and implant-grade jewellery. We discuss allergies and sensitivities beforehand.

chooseArtist.question: How do I choose the right artist?
chooseArtist.answer: Share your ideas and references and we will recommend the artist whose portfolio best matches your style.

styles.question: Which styles do you offer?
styles.answer: We work in realism, fineline, blackwork, neo-traditional, Japanese, and custom concepts.

care.question: How do I care for my tattoo or piercing?
care.answer: You receive a detailed aftercare guide. We explain each step and answer your questions on site.

problems.question: What should I do if I have an issue?
problems.answer: Contact us immediately. We will advise you or arrange a follow-up appointment.

directions.question: How do I find the studio?
directions.answer: We are at Altheimer Eck 11, just steps from Marienplatz. U-Bahn and S-Bahn connections are nearby.
